title: 2025-12-24 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 1.12
description: Automated market-pressure update for 2025-12-24: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 1.12/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. Includes charts, a component breakdown, and a narrative summary.
hero_summary: The daily signal helps separate noise from persistent multi-factor stress. On 2025-12-24, the score printed 1.12/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
